character_designs.identity: weather-bent old Grey Wall master around 50, representative of human border military households, martial vein at the Huajin threshold

body_and_face.age_lock: Around 50, visibly older than the protagonists but not ancient; no immortal-master beauty treatment.
body_and_face.build: Broad shoulders and strong wall-soldier frame compressed by years of wind, snow, hunger pressure, and wall labor.
body_and_face.posture: Slightly bent upper back, stable heavy lower stance, body reads as someone who can absorb impact rather than chase glory.
body_and_face.face: Wind-cracked skin, old scars, rough cheek texture, frost-reddened nose and brow, short hard beard shadow or stubble.
body_and_face.hands: Frost-cracked, thick, rough fingers with swollen joints; hands must be a primary identity detail.
body_and_face.expression: Realist, guarded, terse; looks at wall cracks, wind, and food risk before flags or ideals.

constant_anchors: short worn bone whistle fixed to chest cord or belt
almost-erased Sun-Moon pressure mark hidden on the inside or edge of inherited old armor plate

state_designs.silhouette: Thick practical wall-guard layers with mismatched old plates over a broad but weather-bent body; long spear vertical or leaning against blackstone.
state_designs.color_logic: Grey wall cloth, blackstone grey, old iron, bone white, and frost pale dominate; dark blood red appears only in old repair cord or tiny injury marks.
state_designs.damage_level: Old, repaired, scratched, and frost-worn but complete and functional.
required_details: bone whistle fixed to chest cord or belt
old armor pressure mark hidden or only hinted at from a plate edge
must not read as an official imperial uniform

state_designs.silhouette: Heavier blackstone-shoulder profile, layered old plates and snowline leg wraps, braced stance for absorbing gate impact.
state_designs.color_logic: Border blackstone, snow white, shadow blue, old iron, and cold bone white overlay the grey wall cloth system.
state_designs.damage_level: More scratched and frost-caked than daily state; no polished commander armor.
required_details: blackstone shoulder weight without palace symmetry
old iron buckles and snowline leg wraps readable
no banner, rank plaque, or clean crest

state_designs.silhouette: Deep grey outer cloak or overwrap suppresses armor shine; old soldier identity remains visible through spear, boots, hands, and scarf.
state_designs.color_logic: Deep grey and shadow blue conceal the form; old iron and bone white appear only in small action glimpses.
state_designs.damage_level: Controlled concealment wear, not thief costume and not ragged disguise.
required_details: the same face, hands, and wall-master stance must remain identifiable
old armor is covered but not absent
almost-erased Sun-Moon pressure mark may appear in a small detail panel where he turns or lifts a plate
must not become a black assassin costume

detail_panels.notes: Wind-cracked skin, old scar, rough cheek texture, frost-reddened brow and nose, guarded eyes.

detail_panels.purpose: Show the physical price of wall martial practice and winter survival.
detail_panels.notes: Thick rough fingers, cracked skin, swollen joints, gripping spear shaft or old iron buckle.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Grey Wall function without creating a badge.
detail_panels.notes: Short tactical bone whistle tied with rawhide or hemp cord; coarse scarf worn and repaired.
Practical long spear, old iron spearhead, weathered wood shaft, repair binding; not ceremonial.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry old Zhaoming memory without redesigning or displaying a badge.
detail_panels.notes: Almost-erased Sun-Moon pressure mark on inner or edge surface of inherited plate; broken by rust, snow scratches, and old dents.
Wrapped lower legs, old iron buckles, snow dust, practical boot wear.

detail_panels.purpose: Tie body mechanics to border-wall environment.
detail_panels.notes: He checks wall cracks and wind; stance is compact, heavy, and impact-absorbing.
Grey wall cloth, blackstone, snow crust, old iron, bone white, rawhide, dark blood repair cord, very dull old-gold pressure trace.
